videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: THE MTGGOLDFISH PREVIEW FOR MTGxSPIDERMAN IS HERE
videos.description:
Your friendly neighborhood Crimothy is swinging into action to show off the MTGGoldfish preview card for MTGxSpiderMan!

Today's video is brought toy ou by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

Thanks to Wizards for the free preview!

#MTG #magicthegathering #spiderman

videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: They Made the Meme a Magic Card?!?  Daily Spider-man MTG Spoilers
videos.description:
Today in Spider-man spoilers we get an iconic meme, a camera, the first look at the Arena version of the set and, of course, a ton of Spiders.

Need some Spider-man cards? https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish
Need more spoilers? https://www.mtgpreviews.com

#MTG #magicthegathering #spiderman #mtgspoilers
